title: Knysna moves to clear illegal occupations in Smutsville
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Knysna Municipality has begun taking legal action and physical steps to remove illegal land invaders and structures on municipal property in Sedgefield, near the Usave and Smutsville dunes.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Knysna Municipality has begun taking legal action and physical steps to remove illegal land invaders and structures on municipal property in Sedgefield, near the Usave and Smutsville dunes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The move follows an interim high court order to evict illegal occupants from the site, which has been earmarked for the Sedgefield Infill Housing Programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These illegal invaders erected and occupied the land since 17 October, and reportedly, there are reportedly about 100 structures on the land.","html":"These illegal invaders erected and occupied the land since 17 October, and reportedly, there are reportedly about 100 structures on the land."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Legal action and enforcementAccording to Acting Municipal Manager Dr Richard Martin, a docket has been opened at the Sedgefield Police for contempt of court, with further individual cases of trespassing and contravention of the interim order being prepared.","html":"Legal action and enforcement
According to Acting Municipal Manager Dr Richard Martin, a docket has been opened at the Sedgefield Police for contempt of court, with further individual cases of trespassing and contravention of the interim order being prepared."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We are compiling a list of individuals who have illegally built and occupied structures on the identified properties,\" said Martin. \"Half-built illegal structures are being demolished, and security has been deployed to prevent further occupation.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Martin explained that the local law enforcement cluster, including the police, met on 30 October to finalise a co-ordinated enforcement plan. A service provider has been appointed to assist in clearing the sites, while 24-hour security will ensure compliance with the court order. \"The cluster will implement an overarching anti-land invasion plan,\" he said.","html":"Martin explained that the local law enforcement cluster, including the police, met on 30 October to finalise a co-ordinated enforcement plan. A service provider has been appointed to assist in clearing the sites, while 24-hour security will ensure compliance with the court order. \"The cluster will implement an overarching anti-land invasion plan,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Protecting housing beneficiariesThe municipality maintains that the illegal occupation threatens the R10.7m Sedgefield Infill Housing Project, which aims to deliver over 150 serviced sites in its first phase.","html":"Protecting housing beneficiaries
The municipality maintains that the illegal occupation threatens the R10.7m Sedgefield Infill Housing Project, which aims to deliver over 150 serviced sites in its first phase."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"These transgressors are violating the rights of around 300 pre-screened beneficiaries, including the disabled, elderly, military veterans, and child-headed households,\" Martin stated. \"We will prosecute these offenders to the fullest extent of the law.\"","html":"\"These transgressors are violating the rights of around 300 pre-screened beneficiaries, including the disabled, elderly, military veterans, and child-headed households,\" Martin stated. \"We will prosecute these offenders to the fullest extent of the law.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Community dispute over evictionsHowever, community activist Lynn Kayster, speaking on behalf of the occupiers, challenged the municipality’s interpretation of the court order.","html":"Community dispute over evictions
However, community activist Lynn Kayster, speaking on behalf of the occupiers, challenged the municipality’s interpretation of the court order."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The interdict restricts new trespassers and prohibits further construction - it does not authorise demolitions or evictions of current occupants,\" she said. Kayster added that while removing tents might be justified, dismantling occupied structures requires a formal eviction order."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As tensions rise, both sides await further legal clarification while the municipality urges residents to co-operate to safeguard the housing project’s progress. It has been said that this matter will be heard in court on 28 November, but this has not been officially confirmed.","html":"As tensions rise, both sides await further legal clarification while the municipality urges residents to co-operate to safeguard the housing project’s progress. It has been said that this matter will be heard in court on 28 November, but this has not been officially confirmed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Illegal occupiers of Smutsville face eviction","Illegal occupiers of Smutsville face eviction","Sedgefield residents occupy delayed housing site"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna moves to clear illegal occupations in Smutsville
